REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR, MOOT. THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED IN THIS ACTION IS STRICKEN. THE COMPLAINT IS PURPORTEDLY FILED BY COUNSEL MAKING LIMITED SCOPE APPEARANCE FOR PHILLIP ACHILLES. THERE IS NO INDICATION IF THIS PURPORTED APPEARANCE IS FOR MR. ACHILLIES, AN INDIVIDUAL, MR. ACHILLES, AS TRUSTEE, OR BOTH. FURTHERMORE, AT THE TIME OF THE FILING OF THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT THERE WAS NO MANDATORY FORM CIV-150 ON FILE INDICATING THAT FILING OF THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS WITHIN THE SCOPE OF THE LIMITED REPRESENTATION AND WHEN THIS REPRESENTATION IS TO END. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE UNTIL APRIL 30, 2024 TO FILE AN AMENDED PLEADING IN THIS ACTION. SUCH PLEADING MUST BE FILED BY THE ATTORNEY OF RECORD (CURRENT AT THE TIME OF THE FILING) OR BY LIMITED SCOPE COUNSEL AFTER THE FILING OF CIV-150 EXPRESSLY COVERING THE FILING OF AN AMENDED PLEADING AND INDICATING WHEN THE LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION ASSOCIATED WITH THE FILING OF THE AMENDED PLEADING IS TO TERMINATE. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-10-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, moot. The Second Amended Complaint filed in this action is stricken. The Complaint is purportedly filed by counsel making limited scope appearance for Phillip Achilles. There is no indication if this purported appearance is for Mr. Achillies, an individual, Mr. Achilles, as trustee, or both. Furthermore, at the time of the filing of the Second Amended Complaint there was no mandatory form CIV-150 on file indicating that filing of the Second Amended Complaint is within the scope of the limited representation and when this representation is to end. Plaintiff shall have until April 30, 2024 to file an amended pleading in this action. Such pleading must be filed by the attorney of record (current at the time of the filing) or by limited scope counsel after the filing of CIV-150 expressly covering the filing of an amended pleading and indicating when the limited scope representation associated with the filing of the amended pleading is to terminate.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Off Calendar Dec-22-2023 Continued To Mar-20-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Steven L. Walsh; Benesch, Friedlander, Coplan & Aronoff LLP; 628-600-2250; appearing as counsel for defendants Pender Capital, Inc and Pender Capital Asset Based Lending Fund I, LP.
Marc Libarle; 415-928-2400; appearing in limited scope as counsel for plaintiff Philip Achilles.

Hearing held. The court and the parties discuss documents provided by plaintiff, and service or lack thereof regarding plaintiff's First Amended Complaint. Regarding plaintiff's Peremptory Challenge as to Judge Charles F. Haines, the court denies the challenge as untimely. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained. The court received from plaintiff a Notice of Limited Scope Representation, and a First Amended Complaint filed in violation of CCP Section 472. Plaintiff's opposition is considered. Therefore, leave to amend is granted. 2nd Amended Complaint to be filed and served per code.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
